toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Remove legacy AssemblyInfo.cs and Properties dir

data.reasoningText:
Now I have a full picture of the legacy project. Let me identify all the legacy patterns and then modernize the project file.

Legacy patterns found:
1. **ToolsVersion attribute** on `<Project>` element
2. **XML namespace** (`xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/developer/msbuild/2003"`)
3. **Explicit Import** of `Microsoft.Common.props` and `Microsoft.CSharp.targets`
4. **Explicit Configuration/Platform PropertyGroups** with Debug/Release conditions (SDK defaults handle these)
5. **ProjectGuid** - not needed in SDK-style


6. **FileAlignment**, **AutoGenerateBindingRedirects**, and **Deterministic** - all SDK defaults
7. **Explicit Debug/Release PropertyGroups** with DebugSymbols, DebugType, Optimize, OutputPath, DefineConstants, ErrorReport, WarningLevel - all SDK defaults
8. **Framework assembly references** (System, System.Core, etc.) - implicit in SDK-style
9. **Explicit Compile includes** - SDK-style uses implicit globbing
10. **Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs** - SDK-style auto-generates this

Now for the target framework - TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2 should become `TargetFramework: net472`. The modernized project file can be extremely minimal with just the SDK declaration and target framework. But I should preserve the assembly metadata from AssemblyInfo.cs as project properties instead - things like AssemblyTitle, AssemblyDescription, AssemblyCompany, and AssemblyProduct can map to Description, Company, and other standard project properties.

Since the SDK auto-generates assembly info now, I can move the meaningful metadata to project properties and delete AssemblyInfo.cs entirely. OutputType is Library which is the SDK default anyway, so that can be omitted too. Let me go ahead and modernize this.

data.content:
Build succeeds. Here's a summary of everything that was modernized:

**Legacy patterns removed (47 → 12 lines):**

| Pattern | What changed |
|---|---|
| `ToolsVersion` + XML namespace | → `Sdk="Microsoft.NET.Sdk"` attribute |
| Explicit `Import` of `.props`/`.targets` | → handled by SDK automatically |
| `TargetFrameworkVersion v4.7.2` | → `TargetFramework net472` |
| `Configuration`/`Platform` defaults | → SDK defaults |
| `ProjectGuid`, `FileAlignment`, `Deterministic` | → removed (SDK defaults) |
| `OutputType Library` / `AssemblyName` | → removed (SDK defaults match project name) |
| Debug/Release `PropertyGroup`s | → removed (SDK provides identical defaults) |
| 6 framework `Reference` items | → implicit in .NET Framework SDK-style |
| Explicit `Compile Include` items | → implicit globbing picks up `*.cs` |
| `Properties/AssemblyInfo.cs` | → deleted; metadata moved to `<Version>`, `<Description>`, `<Company>`, `<Copyright>` properties (auto-generated by SDK) |
